operational_notes: This state model is inferred from discovered capabilities and workflow order.
It is intended to scaffold runtime continuity and should not be interpreted as a proof of live production behavior.
E-commerce flows are modeled with an in-memory cart-style session unless the generated server is integrated with durable storage.
description: Starter-grade runtime state model inferred from workflow structure. Useful for generated execution scaffolding, approvals, and session continuity.
